payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up, nearly full-front view of a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular center panel and vertical wood grain; finish is slightly glossy with subtle wear and a small round blemish near the upper center; photographed close (approx. 1.2 m from camera); right edge is slightly cropped by the image border and no hardware (knob/handle) is clearly visible.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark wooden panel cabinet door","long_description":"Close-up, nearly full-front view of a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular center panel and vertical wood grain; finish is slightly glossy with subtle wear and a small round blemish near the upper center; photographed close (approx. 1.2 m from camera); right edge is slightly cropped by the image border and no hardware (knob/handle) is clearly visible.","attributes":["dark brown wood","recessed rectangular panel","vertical grain","slight glossy finish","small round blemish top-center","minor wear marks","right edge slightly cropped","no visible hardware","vertical orientation","close-up view"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
